regime.description: Price is consolidating at 1H EMA50 support (77083.58) within a daily uptrend (+7.58% above EMA200), while experiencing distribution phase (netflow -2352 BTC/day, whale_tx=0). This is a mid-cycle consolidation, not a trend reversal. Multi-timeframe alignment is mixed: daily bullish, 4H overbought/pullback, 1H oversold. This alignment pattern is CLASSIC for consolidation zones within larger uptrends.
